title: workspaces — subscribed events
description: Event → listener bindings this module owns. Workspaces is primarily a publisher module but subscribes to boot + user erasure signals now that we've dropped stancl (which used to wire these). Cascade cleanup of workspaces-boundary rows on user + workspace erasure lives here.

listeners.purpose: Load compiled Host → Workspace + Host → Application map at boot into the request-scoped HostResolver binding. Replaces stancl's runtime domain resolution.
Rebuild host map on hot reload.

When the erased User was the last one referencing an Identity for a given Application, anonymise the Identity + fire IdentityErased. Otherwise no-op — Identity is retained for the surviving User rows.
When the erased User had a WorkspaceContact entry (DPO, billing, technical), clear the person fields but retain the workspace–role linkage so the workspace admin surface can prompt for a replacement.

publishes_only.note: This module also publishes ~19 events consumed elsewhere — see events.json. Each event carries its expected consumers list.
